title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-29
body: Triage complete. Actions taken: (1) spam_wave_42 banned for phishing link spam across multiple channels. (2) toxic_runner banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. (3) Report against core_maintainer dismissed as false positive (brigading). Reports 003 and 004 remain open for manual review (low/medium severity, no immediate action required). Trusted members were not sanctioned.
